title: U.S. to Withdraw 5,000 Troops From Germany. But Thousands Will Remain.
summary_full: The U.S. military has tens of thousands of personnel in Germany, more than in any other foreign country but Japan. Their significance extends well beyond Europe.
summary_public: The U.S. military has tens of thousands of personnel in Germany, more than in any other foreign country but Japan. Their significance extends well beyond Europe.
